label: PTB-XL
title: PTB-XL: Large Publicly Available ECG Dataset
summary: Large publicly available electrocardiography dataset with 12-lead ECG recordings and diagnostic statements.
purpose: To support development and benchmarking of automated ECG interpretation and clinical classification.
inclusionCriteria: Patients undergoing clinical 12-lead ECG recordings at PTB and associated clinics; adult patients.
targets: Diagnostic ECG statements and diagnostic classes derived from SCP codes.
acquisitionMethods: Standard 12-lead ECG recordings (10 seconds) sampled at 500 Hz and distributed in WFDB format.
annotationMethods: ECG statements assigned by experts and mapped to diagnostic classes.
limitations:
Detailed consent and ethics documentation is not reported in the public release.

Note, this metadata record was generated by GPT-5 and may be inaccurate.
privacyCompliance: De-identified dataset; no direct identifiers included in the public release.

citations: Wagner P, Strodthoff N, Bousseljot RD, et al. PTB-XL, a large publicly available electrocardiography dataset. Sci Data. 2020;7(1):154.
Goldberger AL, Amaral LA, Glass L, et al. PhysioBank, PhysioToolkit, and PhysioNet: components of a new research resource for complex physiologic signals. Circulation. 2000;101(23):E215-E220.
